title: polypodium brownii
intro: Polypodium brownii, also known as the Australian polypody, is a type of fern that belongs to the Polypodiaceae family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Polypodium brownii include reducing inflammation, improving wound healing, and supporting immune function. Herbal preparations of this plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions, although further research is needed to confirm its effectiveness.
